svg.text: WID present → AXI3 only (removed in AXI4)
Scoreboard read WRAP: uses tx.AWADDR instead of tx.ARADDR
Read check condition — operator precedence bug (|| and &&)
top module: RESET never goes low (stays 1 always)
Driver: hardcoded m_num_sent counts — brittle pacing logic
AWLEN constrained to 0 only — limits burst length coverage
SVA assertions in interface — good: VALID/READY stability, 4KB boundary, WRAP len
